response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable generalist full-stack engineer with solid fundamentals and genuine breadth across languages and domains, but the resume shows no evidence of the core competencies this role centers on: experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, statistical analysis, or growth engineering. High-throughput distributed systems work at Dunnhumby and recent AI tooling contributions at re:cinq are relevant context but do not offset the complete absence of experimentation and measurement platform expertise. His current seniority (Senior/Staff IC) also falls meaningfully short of the Principal/IC6 bar the role requires.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency requirements
Broad multi-language proficiency (TypeScript, C, C++, Java, DLang) and demonstrated ability to pick up new stacks quickly
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq is directionally aligned with the AI-first product environment
concerns: No evidence whatsoever of experimentation platform experience — A/B testing, feature flagging, rollout automation, or bias detection are entirely absent from the resume
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical/data analysis background visible across 15+ years of employment history
Seniority gap is significant: the candidate operates at Senior/Staff IC level, well below the Principal/IC6 scope and cross-team ownership this role requires
